name: Detect fraud transaction using AI risk-scoring (Dashboard Included)

assignments.name: extractPrompt

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO fraud_detection.transaction_entity (email_id, email_date, bank, merchant, normalized_merchant, amount, currency, transaction_type, purchase_category, shopping_platform, is_online_shopping, payment_method, transaction_date) VALUES ('{{ $json.emailId }}', '{{ $json.emailDate }}', '{{ ($json.bank || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.merchant || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', COALESCE((SELECT canonical_name FROM fraud_detection.merchant_aliases WHERE raw_name = '{{ ($json.merchant || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), '{{ ($json.merchant || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), {{ $json.amount || 0 }}, '{{ $json.currency || 'SGD' }}', '{{ $json.transaction_type || 'OTHER' }}', '{{ $json.purchase_category || 'other' }}', {{ $json.shopping_platform ? "'" + $json.shopping_platform.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.is_online_shopping || false }}, {{ $json.payment_method ? "'" + $json.payment_method.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.transaction_date || new Date().toISOString() }}') ON CONFLICT (email_id) DO UPDATE SET email_date = EXCLUDED.email_date, normalized_merchant = EXCLUDED.normalized_merchant RETURNING *

=INSERT INTO fraud_detection.transaction_fraud_status
  (transaction_id, is_flagged, flag_reason, risk_score)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  true,
  '{{ ($json.flagReason || "Flagged by anomaly detection").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.riskScore || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (transaction_id) DO UPDATE
  SET is_flagged  = true,
      flag_reason = EXCLUDED.flag_reason,
      risk_score  = EXCLUDED.risk_score
RETURNING id as fraud_status_id, transaction_id

=WITH merchant_tier AS (
  SELECT tier, COALESCE(trust_score, 0) as trust_score, notes
  FROM fraud_detection.merchant_tiers
  WHERE merchant_name = '{{ $json.normalizedMerchant }}'
  LIMIT 1
),
cat_stats AS (
  SELECT avg_amount, max_amount, percentile_90, percentile_95, transaction_count
  FROM fraud_detection.merchant_category_stats
  WHERE merchant_name = '{{ $json.normalizedMerchant }}'
    AND purchase_category = '{{ $json.purchase_category }}'
  LIMIT 1
),
baseline AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(category_stats::text, '{}') as category_stats_json
  FROM fraud_detection.user_baseline
  WHERE user_id = 'default'
  LIMIT 1
),
velocity AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int as velocity_today
  FROM fraud_detection.transaction_entity
  WHERE normalized_merchant = '{{ $json.normalizedMerchant }}'
    AND transaction_date = CURRENT_DATE
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT tier FROM merchant_tier), 'GREY') as tier,
  COALESCE((SELECT trust_score FROM merchant_tier), 0) as trust_score,
  COALESCE((SELECT notes FROM merchant_tier), '') as notes,
  NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM fraud_detection.merchant_tiers
             WHERE merchant_name = '{{ $json.normalizedMerchant }}') as is_new_merchant,
  COALESCE((SELECT avg_amount FROM cat_stats), 0) as avg_amount,
  COALESCE((SELECT max_amount FROM cat_stats), 0) as max_amount,
  COALESCE((SELECT percentile_90 FROM cat_stats), 0) as percentile_90,
  COALESCE((SELECT percentile_95 FROM cat_stats), 0) as percentile_95,
  COALESCE((SELECT transaction_count FROM cat_stats), 0) as category_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT category_stats_json FROM baseline), '{}') as category_stats_json,
  COALESCE((SELECT velocity_today FROM velocity), 0) as velocity_today

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('⚙️ Config').first().json._config.llmModel, temperature: 0, max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.extractPrompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: ⚙️ Config
nodes.notes: Configure your Telegram Chat ID here. Get it from @userinfobot.

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text || '\u274c Invalid input. Use the LEGIT/FRAUD buttons on an alert, or reply with: LEGIT <id> or FRAUD <id>' }}

parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  CASE WHEN t.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as found,
  t.id, t.email_id, t.email_date, t.bank, t.merchant, t.amount, t.currency,
  t.transaction_type, t.purchase_category, t.transaction_date,
  fs.id as fraud_status_id, fs.is_flagged, fs.flag_reason, fs.is_confirmed_fraud,
  fs.user_response, fs.responded_at
FROM (SELECT {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}::int as fid) p
LEFT JOIN fraud_detection.transaction_entity t ON t.id = p.fid
LEFT JOIN fraud_detection.transaction_fraud_status fs ON fs.transaction_id = t.id
LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
=\u274c Flag #{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }} not found.

It may have already been processed or doesn't exist.
Check your email for confirmation.

parameters.query:
=UPDATE fraud_detection.transaction_fraud_status
SET
  is_confirmed_fraud = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'FRAUD' THEN true
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'LEGIT' THEN false
    ELSE is_confirmed_fraud
  END,
  user_response = '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}_{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}',
  responded_at = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' IN ('LEGIT', 'FRAUD') THEN NOW()
    ELSE responded_at
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE transaction_id = {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }};

INSERT INTO fraud_detection.transaction_audit_log (transaction_id, action, new_status, changed_by, reason)
VALUES (
  {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }},
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'FRAUD' THEN 'CONFIRMED_FRAUD'
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'LEGIT' THEN 'CONFIRMED_LEGIT'
    ELSE 'VIEWED_DETAILS'
  END,
  '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}',
  'user_telegram',
  'Telegram response: {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }} #{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}'
);
-- Trust score update (v5)
UPDATE fraud_detection.merchant_tiers mt
SET
  trust_score = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'LEGIT'
         THEN LEAST(100, mt.trust_score + 10)
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'FRAUD'
         THEN GREATEST(0, mt.trust_score - 30)
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'FALSE_ALERT'
         THEN LEAST(100, mt.trust_score + 5)
    ELSE mt.trust_score
  END,
  legit_count = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'LEGIT'
         THEN mt.legit_count + 1 ELSE mt.legit_count END,
  fraud_count = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'FRAUD'
         THEN mt.fraud_count + 1 ELSE mt.fraud_count END,
  false_alert_count = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'FALSE_ALERT'
         THEN mt.false_alert_count + 1 ELSE mt.false_alert_count END,
  tier = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'LEGIT'
         AND LEAST(100, mt.trust_score + 10) >= 80 AND mt.tier != 'MANUAL_OVERRIDE' THEN 'GOLD'
    WHEN '{{ $(\'📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)\').first().json.action }}' = 'FRAUD'
         AND GREATEST(0, mt.trust_score - 30) < 40 AND mt.tier != 'MANUAL_OVERRIDE' THEN 'GREY'
    ELSE mt.tier
  END,
  last_adjusted = NOW()
FROM (SELECT normalized_merchant FROM fraud_detection.transaction_entity
      WHERE id = {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}) te
WHERE mt.merchant_name = te.normalized_merchant
  AND mt.tier != 'MANUAL_OVERRIDE';

parameters.text:
={{ (() => { var action = $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action; var flagId = $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId; var t = $('🔍 Fetch Transaction').first().json; var isFraud = action === 'FRAUD'; var isDetails = action === 'DETAILS'; if (isDetails) { return 'Transaction Details

Flag #' + flagId + '
Bank: ' + (t.bank || 'Unknown') + '
Merchant: ' + (t.merchant || 'Unknown') + '
Amount: ' + t.amount + ' ' + t.currency + '
Type: ' + (t.transaction_type || 'Unknown') + '
Date: ' + (t.email_date || 'Unknown') + '
Category: ' + (t.purchase_category || 'N/A') + '
Flagged: ' + (t.flag_reason || 'N/A') + '

Use LEGIT/FRAUD buttons to respond.'; } return 'Response Recorded

Flag #' + flagId + ': ' + (isFraud ? 'CONFIRMED FRAUD' : 'LEGITIMATE') + '

Bank: ' + (t.bank || 'Unknown') + '
Merchant: ' + (t.merchant || 'Unknown') + '
Amount: ' + t.amount + ' ' + t.currency + '
Type: ' + (t.transaction_type || 'Unknown') + '

Updated: ' + new Date().toISOString().replace('T', ' ').substring(0, 19); })() }}

={{ (() => { var action = $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action; var flagId = $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId; var t = $('🔍 Fetch Transaction').first().json; var isFraud = action === 'FRAUD'; return 'Response Recorded

Flag #' + flagId + ': ' + (isFraud ? 'CONFIRMED FRAUD' : 'LEGITIMATE') + '

Bank: ' + (t.bank || 'Unknown') + '
Merchant: ' + (t.merchant || 'Unknown') + '
Amount: ' + t.amount + ' ' + t.currency + '
Type: ' + (t.transaction_type || 'Unknown') + '

Updated: ' + new Date().toISOString().replace('T', ' ').substring(0, 19); })() }}

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO fraud_detection.merchant_tiers (merchant_name, tier, frequency_cap, assigned_by, assigned_at)
SELECT 
  t.merchant,
  '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}',
  CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'GOLD' THEN 5
    WHEN '{{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.action }}' = 'SILVER' THEN 10
    ELSE 20
  END,
  'user_telegram',
  NOW()
FROM fraud_detection.transaction_entity t
WHERE t.id = {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}
ON CONFLICT (merchant_name) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  tier = EXCLUDED.tier,
  frequency_cap = EXCLUDED.frequency_cap,
  assigned_by = EXCLUDED.assigned_by,
  assigned_at = EXCLUDED.assigned_at,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

=UPDATE fraud_detection.transaction_fraud_status 
SET 
  is_false_positive = true,
  false_positive_reason = 'User marked as false alert via Telegram',
  user_response = 'FALSE_ALERT',
  responded_at = NOW()
WHERE transaction_id = {{ $('📊 Parse Input (Text or Callback)').first().json.flagId }}
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:
=✅ Merchant tier updated!

{{ $('💾 Update Merchant Tier').first().json.merchant_name }} → {{ $('💾 Update Merchant Tier').first().json.tier }} tier

Future transactions from this merchant will use tier-based detection rules.

parameters.query: SELECT key, value FROM fraud_detection.fraud_detection_config WHERE key IN ('timezone', 'high_value_threshold', 'llm_choice', 'telegram_chat_id') ORDER BY key;

=INSERT INTO fraud_detection.fraud_detection_config (key, value, updated_at)
VALUES
  ('timezone', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.ianaTimezone }}', NOW()),
  ('timezone_offset', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.utcOffset }}', NOW()),
  ('scan_cron_utc', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.scanCronUTC }}', NOW()),
  ('high_value_threshold', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.highValueThreshold }}', NOW()),
  ('llm_choice', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.llmChoice }}', NOW()),
  ('telegram_chat_id', '{{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.chatId }}', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, updated_at = NOW()

CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.transaction_entity (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  email_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  email_date DATE,
  bank VARCHAR(100),
  merchant VARCHAR(255),
  normalized_merchant VARCHAR(255),
  amount NUMERIC(12,2),
  currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'SGD',
  transaction_type VARCHAR(50),
  purchase_category VARCHAR(50),
  shopping_platform VARCHAR(100),
  is_online_shopping BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  payment_method VARCHAR(50),
  transaction_date TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.transaction_fraud_status (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_id INTEGER UNIQUE REFERENCES fraud_detection.transaction_entity(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  is_flagged BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  flag_reason TEXT,
  is_confirmed_fraud BOOLEAN,
  user_response VARCHAR(50),
  risk_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  is_false_positive BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  false_positive_reason TEXT,
  responded_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.merchant_tiers (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  merchant_name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'GREY',
  trust_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  legit_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  fraud_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  false_alert_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  frequency_cap INTEGER DEFAULT 10,
  assigned_by VARCHAR(100),
  assigned_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  last_adjusted TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.merchant_aliases (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  raw_name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  canonical_name VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.merchant_category_stats (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  merchant_name VARCHAR(255),
  purchase_category VARCHAR(50),
  transaction_count INTEGER,
  avg_amount NUMERIC(12,2),
  max_amount NUMERIC(12,2),
  percentile_90 NUMERIC(12,2),
  percentile_95 NUMERIC(12,2),
  UNIQUE(merchant_name, purchase_category)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.user_baseline (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'default',
  category_stats JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(user_id)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.discovered_institutions (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  institution_name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  institution_type VARCHAR(50),
  first_seen_date DATE,
  email_domain VARCHAR(255),
  sender_email VARCHAR(255),
  confidence_score INTEGER,
  is_financial BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.transaction_audit_log (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_id INTEGER,
  action VARCHAR(50),
  new_status VARCHAR(50),
  changed_by VARCHAR(50),
  reason TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fraud_detection.fraud_detection_config (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  key VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  value TEXT,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
INSERT INTO fraud_detection.user_baseline (user_id, category_stats)
  VALUES ('default', '{}') ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING;

parameters.text:
=✅ *Finance Tracker is ready!*

📊 Dashboard: your-n8n-url/webhook/finance-dashboard
⏰ Daily scan: 6:00 AM {{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.cityLabel }}
💰 Alert threshold: ${{ $('⚙️ Setup State').first().json.highValueThreshold }}

🔍 Running initial 90-day scan in the background...
You'll see data in your dashboard within 1-2 hours.

Send /reconfigure anytime to update settings.

parameters.query: SELECT json_agg(email_domain) as domains FROM fraud_detection.discovered_institutions;

UPDATE fraud_detection.user_baseline SET category_stats = (
  SELECT json_object_agg(category, stats) FROM (
    SELECT purchase_category as category, json_build_object(
      'count', COUNT(*),
      'mean', ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2),
      'stddev', ROUND(COALESCE(STDDEV(amount), 0)::numeric, 2),
      'q1', ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount)::numeric, 2),
      'q3', ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount)::numeric, 2),
      'iqr', ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount) - PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount))::numeric, 2),
      'p95', ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount)::numeric, 2)
    ) as stats
    FROM fraud_detection.transaction_entity
    WHERE amount > 0 AND transaction_type = 'SPENDING'
    GROUP BY purchase_category HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
  ) sub
) WHERE user_id = 'default';

parameters.text:
=✅ Fraud detection backfill complete

Processed: {{ $json.data?.length || 0 }} transactions

Visit your Finance Dashboard to see the data.

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE fraud_detection.transaction_entity SET purchase_category='" + $json.updateCategory + "' WHERE id=" + $json.updateId + " RETURNING id,purchase_category" }}

parameters.content:
## Detect fraud transaction using AI risk-scoring (Dashboard Included)

Daily scanner reads your bank transaction emails, extracts amount / merchant / category with AI, applies a 4-layer risk score (universal rules + statistical baselines + tier-based + contextual), and pings Telegram when anything looks suspicious. A self-hosted dashboard at `/webhook/finance-dashboard` renders spending trends with a Privacy Mode toggle that masks all $ amounts to `***` for screen-sharing.

### How it works
1. **Backfill** (▶ 30/60/90 days) or **Daily 6 AM Trigger** fetches bank emails
2. **AI extracts** structured transaction JSON from each email body
3. **Anomaly Detection** runs 4-layer risk scoring (0–100)
4. Flagged transactions → **Telegram alert** with LEGIT / FRAUD / FALSE ALERT buttons
5. Your tap-responses update the **merchant trust tier** (self-learning)
6. **Dashboard webhook** renders charts at `/webhook/finance-dashboard`

### Setup (3 steps)
**Step 1.** Add 4 credentials in n8n (use the credentials page, then come back):
- Gmail OAuth — required by 4 nodes (Gmail fetch + search nodes)
- OpenRouter / OpenAI-compatible LLM — required by 1 LLM extract node
- Telegram Bot — required by 12 alert + handler nodes
- PostgreSQL — required by 15 nodes (storage + dashboard queries)

**Step 2.** Open the red-highlighted `⚙️ Config` node and paste your values: `telegramChatId`, `knownBanks`, `alertRiskThreshold`, `llmModel`. Inline comments tell you where to obtain each value.

**Step 3.** Send `/setup` to your Telegram bot — it creates the `fraud_detection` schema and saves user config. Then click ▶ Backfill 30 Days to populate historical data.

### Customization tips
- Swap LLM via `llmBaseUrl` + `llmModel` (Mistral Nemo recommended for cost)
- Privacy Mode toggle (top-right of dashboard) masks all $ amounts
- Add custom risk rules in the `🔍 Anomaly Detection` Code node

## Daily fraud scanner
Daily Trigger or backfill → Gmail fetch → AI extract → 4-layer risk score → Telegram alert.

## Telegram handler + /setup wizard
LEGIT/FRAUD/FALSE ALERT button responses, merchant tier learning, and first-time setup wizard.

## Weekly bank detector (orphan - enable when ready)
Sunday scan for new bank senders. Currently disabled.

## 30/60/90 day backfill
Three manual triggers for one-shot historical fraud scan on install.

## Self-hosted finance dashboard
Webhook at /webhook/finance-dashboard with Privacy Mode toggle, Chart.js graphs.

## ⚠️ EDIT THIS

Open `⚙️ Config` and paste your `telegramChatId`, `llmModel`, etc. (inline comments show where to obtain each).
